debug_info.goal:
mp : MontgomeryPoint
sign : U8
⊢ ∃ opt_e,
    mp.to_edwards sign = ok opt_e ∧
      let u := U8x32_as_Nat mp;
      ((u + 1) % p = 0 → opt_e = none) ∧
        ((u + 1) % p ≠ 0 →
          opt_e = none ∨
            ∃ e x_sign,
              opt_e = some e ∧
                field.FieldElement51.is_negative e.X = ok x_sign ∧
                  let y := Field51_as_Nat e.Y;
                  y * (u + 1) % p = (u - 1) % p ∧ (x_sign.val = 1#u8 ↔ (↑sign).testBit 0 = true))

    | none =>
      simp [*]; intro; simp [field.FieldElement51.invert_spec] at h_inv; simp_all
    | some inv =>

        ring_nf; simp_all
